product.name: Houdini
product.platform: macOS 14+ / Apple Silicon (native iOS app scaffolded, not shipped — ADR-008)
product.pitch: See your Claude spend at a glance, right from your Mac's menu bar.

surfaces.name: Menu bar app
surfaces.note: Flagship surface; ~60s refresh; popover with full detail.

surfaces.name: Native desktop widget
surfaces.note: SwiftUI in an NSPanel, ships inside the menu bar app; ~60s refresh. Not branded separately (ADR-010/011).

surfaces.name: Notification Center widget
surfaces.note: apps/widget is a README placeholder today (no built target in tree); ~15min cap, intentionally unadvertised (ADR-002).

surfaces.name: iOS app (HoudiniMobile)
surfaces.note: Scaffold + iOS-ready core only (apps/ios, XcodeGen). Cookie auth; not buildable on CommandLineTools-only machines (ADR-008).

surfaces.name: iOS Home/Lock Screen widgets
surfaces.note: apps/ios/HoudiniWidget scaffold; inherits Apple's widget refresh budget (ADR-002/008).

providers.name: Claude (Pro/Max)
providers.source: api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/usage (Claude Code OAuth token in Keychain) OR claude.ai/api/organizations/{org}/usage (session cookie)

providers.name: OpenAI Platform
providers.method: JSON (organization admin key, stored only in Keychain — ADR-011)

install.method: curl | bash one-liner from a pinned GitHub Release
install.integrity: SHA-256 verified against SHASUMS256.txt (aborts on any mismatch); SHASUMS256.txt is a per-release asset generated by .github/workflows/release.yml, not stored in the repo

priorities.title: App — Login / credential refactor (works for any Claude user, not just CLI-token users)
App — Widget accessibility + visual polish (menu bar + desktop widget)
Site — Polish to zero-clutter + ongoing features

security_posture.server: none — requests go straight from the user's Mac to each provider's endpoint
